sourceTitle: Using AI in university | Current Students – UNSW Sydney
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The unauthorised or unacknowledged use of AI in assessments is a form of cheating and is considered to be student misconduct at UNSW under the current Code of Conduct and Values.
evidenceLocator: FAQ section 'What are the implications of unauthorised use of AI?'
